description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named WebAssembly Publish that can be triggered manually or when a release is published. Run a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Node.js to the latest LTS version, prepares for publishing by updating the npm version and README, sets up Emscripten 3.1.0, installs dependencies, builds TypeScript and WebAssembly, runs tests, and publishes to npm using a token from secrets.
